entity_field_schema.id: slug, unique. = models.dev provider id where one exists
entity_field_schema.aliases: list[str] of spellings/host-token forms that should resolve to this id
entity_field_schema.models_dev_provider: models.dev provider key this row was built from (null if EEE-only)
entity_field_schema.canonical_org: for author_lab also present in seed/orgs.yaml: the org id
entity_field_schema.variant_of: for regional_variant/coding_plan: the base platform id it duplicates
entity_field_schema.also_author / also_hosts: flag: provider is BOTH author_lab and an inference host
entity_field_schema.alias_of: this id is a duplicate of another platform id

together.note: prefix together/ on RedPajama-* ids are Together-authored, not re-host; suffix -together is a re-host spelling

groq.note: Groq/Llama-3-Groq-8B-Tool-Use is a Groq-authored finetune on HF, NOT a re-host

databricks.note: databricks/dbrx,dolly are Databricks-authored (author signal, not re-host)

huggingface.note: HuggingFaceH4/HuggingFaceTB orgs are author orgs; not the inference router

platforms.note: Amazon's own Nova model family API
